g.id: cluster_Internal Java Corpus API.nnarrow data plane behind harness tools
g.text: narrow data plane behind harness tools
The fixed paper scope is a Java product decision.
Python can narrow within it, not expand beyond it.
paper candidate -> location candidate -> exact read -> Evidence ID -> accepted answer.
Only read_locations creates citeable paper-content evidence.
final answer must be sole tool call
